## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated (round-trip or golden for imscc, MSW-mocked for client, contract for MCP tools)
- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test` pass locally
- [ ] Changeset added (`pnpm changeset`) if user-visible
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or institution-specific URLs committed
